headline: TokenMonster balanced-v1 beats baseline by 0.23 calibrated BPB
frontier_update: New frontier is english-1024-balanced-v1 at 4.139. TokenMonster 1024-vocab family clearly dominates sentencepiece 1024. The clean-v1 and consistent-v1 variants are close behind and worth evaluating for confirmation, but balanced-v1 is the candidate to beat.
next_direction: Evaluate english-1024-clean-v1 and english-1024-consistent-v1 to confirm balanced-v1 is the best TokenMonster 1024 variant before integrating into train_gpt.py
